# Stopping the Collapse — LLM Context File
# IWasReady.com | StopTheCollapse.com

## What this site is
Stopping the Collapse is a publication and navigation guide for founders of regenerative businesses, intentional communities, and New Earth organizations facing structural collapse. It maps 7 structural patterns that end these projects and provides repair architecture for each.

## Author
Rick Broider (also known as Omja Brhad)
Systems architect, community builder, author
https://rickbroider.substack.com

## Source work
Book: Bridging Earth and Kanaria: A New Earth Field Guide to Galactic Ethics, AI, and the Architecture of Harmony
Author: Rick Broider
Format: 33-chapter audiobook
Chapters: 33, organized around 7 collapse patterns

## The 7 collapse patterns
1. Unresolved conflict cycles — the same argument in different costumes
2. Vision drift — shared purpose becoming private assumption
3. Governance shadows — one voice structurally controlling every decision
4. Financial fragility — money conversations that nobody will name out loud
5. Founder burnout — running on obligation after aliveness has left
6. Wrong-fit people — someone draining what everyone else is building
7. The scale trap — structures that worked at 8 people failing at 25

## Free resource
The Navigation Legend: maps all 7 collapse patterns to the exact chapters that address each one. Free via Substack subscription.
URL: https://iwasready.com
Substack: https://rickbroider.substack.com

## Keywords and topics
community governance, intentional community, regenerative systems design, sociocracy, holacracy, community resilience, New Earth organization, organizational collapse, community conflict resolution, conscious technology, AI governance, galactic ethics, regenerative economics, community building, founder burnout, governance models
